title: homolog_index_query output
description: Output of a single gene lookup. Available in TSV (default) or JSON (--format json). Both encodings carry the same per-hit fields.
tsv_no_match_behaviour: When the gene is not in the index: only the header line is emitted (unless --no_header). Exit code remains 0.

n_hits_total.description: Hits in the index for this gene before filtering. Present only when found=true.

n_hits_emitted.description: Hits actually written to `hits` after --source / --min_identity / --min_bitscore / --limit filtering. Present only when found=true.

source_label.description: Source label assigned at build time (e.g. species name).

bitscore.description: -1 if not available (miniprot without ms:i:/AS:i: tag).

filtering_flags.--source diamond|miniprot: Keep only hits from this source type.
filtering_flags.--min_identity F: Keep only hits with identity >= F (fractional 0..1).
filtering_flags.--min_bitscore F: Keep only hits with bitscore >= F.
filtering_flags.--limit N: Stop emitting after N hits. Combined with sort order (bitscore desc) gives top-N.

sort_order_note: Within a gene, hits are pre-sorted at build time by bitscore descending, then identity descending. --limit N therefore returns the top-N by bitscore.
